_doc: VALID-01 declarative OUTPUT-CONTRACT shape map. Per output-artifact BASENAME (or relpath for fan-out files), the top-level keys that MUST be present after a step emits, plus the container type. validate-shape.js consumes this: presence + correct top-level shape + non-hollow. '__MD__' = a non-empty markdown/text file (no JSON keys). Keys are the SHELL top-level contract (SHELL-BUILD-SPEC §7 'presence now, congruence later'); field-level seam schemas are deferred content (CONTENT-02). The 4 basenames with deep validators (brands.json, dump.json, space-map.json, *-beliefs.json) are ALSO shape-checked here as defense-in-depth, but their deep enum/trace rules live in validate-finder/revenue/classifier/analyzer + route.js dispatch.
